response.justification: The candidate is a strong senior engineer with deep open-source involvement, Linux experience, and broad full-stack skills, but falls short of this executive-level role's core requirements. German proficiency is listed as basic while the role requires C1 minimum, and the resume shows no formal team leadership, technical project management, or client advisory experience at the head-of-development level. UML, Python, and requirements management — explicitly desired — are absent.
strengths: Extensive hands-on experience across web, mobile, embedded, and high-performance systems
Genuine open-source commitment (GISCollective founder, D-language libraries, FOSS4G speaker) aligned with digital sovereignty focus
Strong software craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, mentoring via workshops and courses)
concerns: German listed as basic; role requires minimum C1
No demonstrated leadership of teams or operational oversight of client projects
Missing key desired skills: Python, UML, formal architecture/requirements management
